title: Hashicorp tokens should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: HashiCorp Vault token detected. Exposing this token grants attackers access to all secrets and policies the token is authorized for in Vault, enabling exfiltration of database credentials, TLS certificates, API keys, encryption keys, and any other secrets stored in the Vault cluster.

HashiCorp Terraform Cloud API token detected. Exposing this token grants attackers access to Terraform Cloud workspaces, state files containing infrastructure secrets, variable sets, and the ability to trigger or manipulate infrastructure deployments.
